title: Home | Makassed University of Beirut
scope_relevance: Official university homepage; confirms institution identity, faculties, navigation, address, and contact details.
notes: The active public website for Makassed University of Beirut is mub.edu.lb. The user-provided makassed.edu.lb appears to correspond to the broader Makassed organization, not the university site used for official university pages.

title: Faculties | Makassed University of Beirut
scope_relevance: Official faculty index listing the Faculty of Nursing and Health Sciences, Faculty of Islamic Studies, and Faculty of Teacher Education.
notes: Used for recursive discovery routing. Faculty existence alone was not treated as graduate evidence.

title: Faculty of Islamic Studies | Makassed University of Beirut
scope_relevance: Primary official evidence for graduate offerings in Islamic Studies.
notes: Page states the faculty focuses exclusively on graduate studies and offers master’s and doctoral programs. It describes master structure, doctoral duration, admissions requirements, and 2025-2026 master schedules.

title: Tuition fees | Makassed University of Beirut
scope_relevance: Official tuition page for 2025-2026; includes Faculty of Islamic Studies Master Diploma and PHD Diploma fee rows.
notes: Tuition rows support that Islamic Studies graduate-level master/PHD fee categories exist, but program existence is primarily supported by the faculty page.

title: Apply Online | Makassed University of Beirut
scope_relevance: Official application form; search cache exposed required document language for students from other universities and private university degree equivalency.
notes: Direct page fetch was blocked by verification, so it was not used as primary evidence.

title: Financial Support | Makassed University of Beirut
scope_relevance: Official financial aid request form; asks about scholarship/support source and amount.
notes: No graduate-specific financial aid rule found on the captured page.

title: Academic Calendar | Makassed University of Beirut
notes: Calendar is institution-level; no graduate-specific calendar found.

title: Faculty of Nursing and Health Sciences | Makassed University of Beirut
scope_relevance: Official faculty page inspected for graduate program evidence.
notes: Mission text references a Masters’ program developed to prepare nurses for advanced practice, but captured faculty programs section is Bachelor-focused. Not sufficient alone for a graduate inventory row without a clear current program listing.

title: Faculty of Teacher Education | Makassed University of Beirut
scope_relevance: Official faculty page inspected for graduate program evidence and out-of-scope programs.
notes: Teaching Diplomas and postgraduate professional certificates were found, but diplomas/certificates are out of scope. Faculty profile references to graduate programs at other universities were ignored.
